headline: PSEG (PEG) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: PSEG (PEG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +5.59% and +17.59%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
